# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 19
##### § 509-B — Qualifications of bus drivers

Notwithstanding any other provision of law, a person shall be qualified to operate a bus only if such person:

(1) is at least eighteen years old;

(2) has been issued a currently valid driver’s license or permit which is valid for the operation of the bus in this state;

(3) has passed the bus driver physical examination administered pursuant to regulations established by the commissioner; and

(4) is not disqualified to drive a motor vehicle pursuant to section five hundred nine-c or any other provision of this article.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

is not disqualified to drive a motor vehicle pursuant to section five hundred nine-c or any other provision of this article.
